message:
fix(declassification): harden pipeline with four targeted safety fixes

1. Emit stage event on deny decisions when loss exceeds threshold —
   previously silent denials left no audit trail for debugging.

2. Fix find_active_emergency_grant to also check !g.review_completed,
   preventing grants that finished review from being treated as active
   emergency overrides.

3. Add extension_id mismatch guard in evaluate_policy — fail-closed
   when the submitted extension_id doesn't match the policy's bound
   extension, preventing cross-extension policy confusion.

4. Use saturating_add for expiry_ms calculation instead of bare +,
   eliminating potential u64 overflow on extreme grant durations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
